subcodes.first_line: In this day all things proclaim "The Truth hath come!" Blessed is the soul that hath attained unto the hearing of this Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز جمیع اشیا بقد اتی الحق ناطق طوبی از برای نفسیکه باصغاء ندا فائز شد اکثر
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @exhortations and counsels, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution
